violations.text: Previous Day Calzones packaged in the food establishment and set for customer self-selection are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients and allergens, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Labels for packaged items are to be created and applied to the packaging. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

The back door to the outside is not tight-fitting (gap along the side of door frame). Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Weather stripping/seal to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

Plastic pans/containers were observed stored clean on the equipment storage rack with the food contact surfaces facing up. Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted to prevent possible contamination.. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of repair/adjustment... - The ceiling was observed to be cracked and chipping in the back oven area and in need of repair - The floor-to-wall juncture coving was observed to be missing in areas of the kitchen and in need of replacement (behind the 3-bay sink, end wall near chest freezers) Physical facilities are to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered/sealed with a textured surface that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Ceiling surface is to be sealed with a coating or material that is smooth, durable, easily cleanable. (Appropriate surface characteristics handout printed for the pic at the time of inspection.) New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2026

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed to be in need of more frequent cleaning... - The ceiling over the oven area - The wall/floor behind the ovens - The wall/floor behind the dough mixer The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Calzones held in refrigeration from previous day and packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

At the time of inspection, scoops with handles used for dry ingredients were observed with handles in the food item. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Scoops adjusted at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024
An allergy statement is needed on the menus. Until the new menus are printed establishment to have allergy statement added to counter near register. New Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2023

Food contact surfaces of the slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer to be sanitized prior to next use. PIC to review proper cleaning procedures with staff. New Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
